description_long: This sculpture depicts a muscular male figure wearing a helmet, standing upright with arms crossed over his chest. In front of him, two kneeling figures—one male and one female—are positioned in a posture of supplication or mourning, their heads bowed and bodies partially entwined. The male figure at the back is rendered with pronounced anatomical detail, emphasizing strength and protection, while the kneeling figures display softer, more vulnerable forms. The base of the sculpture is rectangular with beveled edges and features additional sculpted elements, such as a helmet and a tool, possibly symbolizing labor or sacrifice. The entire piece is crafted in a uniform, reddish-brown stone or stone-like material, giving it a monolithic and solemn appearance. The composition suggests themes of heroism, remembrance, or commemoration, typical of public monuments.
description: A detailed, reddish-brown stone sculpture featuring a standing helmeted man with crossed arms and two kneeling figures at his feet, set on a rectangular base. The work conveys strength, protection, and solemnity.
description_view_0: The front view shows the helmeted man standing with arms crossed, flanked by two kneeling figures, with the base and sculpted details clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the muscular build of the standing figure and the profile of the kneeling figures, emphasizing the depth and layering of the composition.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back musculature of the standing figure and the textured surface behind the kneeling figures, with less detail visible on their faces.
description_view_3: The right side view provides a profile of the standing figure and a clearer view of the kneeling male figure's posture and the base's sculpted elements.
attribute_subject_matter: heroic human figures in a commemorative or memorial pose
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture appears suitable for outdoor public spaces such as plazas or parks.
